title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 217.465 - Escape by offender, effect of
text:
217.465.  Escape by offender, effect of. — Escape from custody by any offender subsequent to his execution of a request for final disposition of an untried indictment, information or complaint shall void the request.
(L. 1982 H.B. 1196 § 81, A.L. 1989 H.B. 408)
